What courses do I need for my CS degree?

Hello Alex,

Based on the provided bulletin content for the Computer Science Major (B.S.), here are some of your required courses:

*   MATH 215 - Survey of Calculus (3 credits) OR MATH 230 - Calculus I (4 credits)
*   BCOM 231 - Business Communication (3 credits) OR ENG 317 - Technical Writing (3 credits)
*   CS 215 - Discrete Structures for Computer Science (3 credits)
*   CS 258 - Introduction to Object-Oriented Programming Using C# (3 credits)
*   CS 311 - Data Structures and Analysis of Algorithms (3 credits)
*   CS 321 - Architecture (partial course name from bulletin)

Please note that this is a partial list of the 52-53 required hours for your 64-65 hour major. You have completed 45 of your 120 total credits.
